segments.text: Mild's trajectory adjustment was really clean there!
segments.original_text: マイルド側のね軌道の変え方が上手かったですね

segments.text: From the knockdown into the fair!
Won't go for the KO, but...
segments.original_text: さすがに撃墜はしないが
空中下着地を通したい

full_text: Mild's trajectory adjustment was really clean there! Whoa! From the knockdown into the fair! Won't go for the KO, but... Looking to land that dair!

corrections.rule: Whisper kanji homophone: 点灯→転倒, 空中へ→空中前 (空前)
